observe: You don't need everything loaded to move. Just what you're touching, right now.
fault: You reached for something that was never brought up here. The system has to stop and fetch it — that's not free.
repair: Watch it load. Disk to frame, frame to page table, then you can continue.
escape: Every fault costs time we don't have. Move carefully.

observe: Demand paging loads pages from disk only when they are accessed.
fault: A page fault triggered a load from the backing store.
repair: Trace the page fault handling sequence.
escape: Confirm the faulted page loads and execution resumes.

hints: The sequence is always: fault, locate on disk, evict if needed, load, resume.
